narration: Did you know that your brain's connections are shaped by activity?
visual_description: Hook visual: Did you know that your brain's connections are shaped by activity?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Did you know that your brain's connections are shaped by activity?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Did you know that your brain's connections are shaped by activity?

narration: This idea, known as the Hebbian principle, states that neurons that fire together, wire together.
visual_description: Context visual: This idea, known as the Hebbian principle, states that neurons that fire together, wire together.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This idea, known as the Hebbian principle, states that neurons that fire together, wire together.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This idea, known as the Hebbian principle, states that neurons that fire together, wire together.

narration: When you learn something new, those neurons connect more strongly.
visual_description: Escalation visual: When you learn something new, those neurons connect more strongly.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: When you learn something new, those neurons connect more strongly.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: When you learn something new, those neurons connect more strongly.

narration: Recent studies suggest this process may enhance memory retention and skill acquisition.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Recent studies suggest this process may enhance memory retention and skill acquisition.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Recent studies suggest this process may enhance memory retention and skill acquisition.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Recent studies suggest this process may enhance memory retention and skill acquisition.

narration: So, practicing a skill repeatedly can literally rewire your brain!
